name: answer-simple
description: Plain-language guard: always-apply 5-step self-check rule + /answer-simple draft audit skill + Stop hook (answer_simple_stop.ts) that mechanically BLOCKS the agent's final message when it is a wall of internal codes (FR-N/ARCH-N/SCREAMING_CODE) or excessively verbose prose, feeding back a plain-language rewrite reason. Closes the trust-based gap the rule alone left (agent could skip self-check under pressure).
